# majordome_utilities.plotting

```{python}
from majordome_utilities.documents import *
from majordome_utilities.plotting import (
    MajordomePlot,
    PowerFormatter,
    centered_colormap,
)
```

```{python}
doc = DocumentedClass(MajordomePlot)
```

```{python}
doc.constructor()
```

```{python}
doc.members()
```

```{python}
doc.properties()
```

```{python}
doc.classmethods()
```

```{python}
doc.staticmethods()
```

```{python}
entry = SignatureEntry(PowerFormatter)
entry.documentation()
```

## General utilities

```{python}
entry = SignatureEntry(centered_colormap)
entry.documentation()
```
